scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w services/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w services/auth-service" "npm run dev -w services/catalog-service" "npm run dev -w services/article-service" "npm run dev -w services/audit-service" "npm run dev -w services/notification-service"
scripts.dev:microservices: concurrently "npm run dev -w services/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w services/auth-service" "npm run dev -w services/catalog-service" "npm run dev -w services/article-service" "npm run dev -w services/audit-service" "npm run dev -w services/notification-service"
scripts.docker:build:microservices: npm run docker:build:api-gateway && npm run docker:build:auth-service && npm run docker:build:catalog-service && npm run docker:build:article-service && npm run docker:build:audit-service && npm run docker:build:notification-service && npm run docker:build:frontend
